---
title: "SL_final_proj"
author: "Michele Maslowski"
date: "2025-05-01"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

rm(list = ls()) #Clear workspace

library("tidyverse")          #For data manipulation
library("ggplot2")            #For nice plots
library('Metrics')
library('gridExtra')
library('dplyr')
library("ISLR")
library("glmnet")
library("MASS")
library("caret")
library("splines")
library("boot")
library("class")
library("nnet")
library('Rmpfr')
library('reshape2')
library('pROC')
library('themis')
library('FNN')
library('recipes')
```

```{r load data}
data <- read.csv("/Users/wangjiaqi/Downloads/heart-attack-risk-analysis/train.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ",")

# converting catergorical variables
data$Sex <- factor(data$Sex)
data$Sex <- as.numeric(data$Sex)

data$Diet <- factor(data$Diet)
data$Diet <- as.numeric(data$Diet)

data$Country <- factor(data$Country)
data$Country <- as.numeric(data$Country)

data$Continent <- factor(data$Continent)
data$Continent <- as.numeric(data$Continent)

data$Hemisphere <- factor(data$Hemisphere)
data$Hemisphere <- as.numeric(data$Hemisphere)

# converting blood pressure to usable values
data <- data %>%
  separate(Blood.Pressure, into = c("systolic", "diastolic"), sep = "/") %>%
  mutate(across(c(systolic, diastolic), as.numeric))

# converting int to num
data <- data %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.integer), as.numeric))

# check for NaNs
NaNs = colSums(is.na(data))
# no missing values 

# remove sub ID 
clean_data <- subset(data, select = -Patient.ID)

```

```{r}
# Convert target variable to factor BEFORE splitting
clean_data$Heart.Attack.Risk <- factor(clean_data$Heart.Attack.Risk, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("NoRisk", "Risk"))

set.seed(123)
train_indices <- sample(1:nrow(clean_data), size = 0.8 * nrow(clean_data))
train_data <- clean_data[train_indices, ]
test_data  <- clean_data[-train_indices, ]

```


```{r}
# Logistic
# Logistic regression
set.seed(123)
logit_model <- glm(Heart.Attack.Risk ~ ., data = train_data, family = binomial)
logit_probs <- predict(logit_model, newdata = test_data, type = "response")
logit_pred <- factor(ifelse(logit_probs > 0.5, "Risk", "NoRisk"), levels = c("NoRisk", "Risk"))

# Confusion matrix
library(caret)
logit_cm <- confusionMatrix(logit_pred, test_data$Heart.Attack.Risk)
print(logit_cm)


# ROC Curve
roc_obj <- roc(test_data$Heart.Attack.Risk, logit_probs, levels = c("NoRisk", "Risk"))
plot(roc_obj, main = "Logistic Regression ROC Curve")
print(paste("AUC:", auc(roc_obj)))

# Confusion matrix heatmap
cm_df <- as.data.frame(logit_cm$table)
ggplot(cm_df, aes(Prediction, Reference, fill = Freq)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = Freq), color = "white", size = 6) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "blue", high = "red") +
  labs(title = "Logistic Regression Confusion Matrix", x = "Predicted", y = "Actual")

```

```{r}
# Logistic with SMOTE
### Automatic SMOTE Ratio Tuning
set.seed(123)
smote_ratios <- seq(0.1, 1.0, by = 0.1) # Range of SMOTE ratios to test
auc_results <- data.frame(Ratio = smote_ratios, AUC = numeric(length(smote_ratios)))

for (i in seq_along(smote_ratios)) {
  ratio <- smote_ratios[i]
  
  # Apply SMOTE with this ratio
  smote_recipe <- recipe(Heart.Attack.Risk ~ ., data = train_data) %>%
    step_smote(Heart.Attack.Risk, over_ratio = ratio) %>%  
    prep()
  
  smote_train <- bake(smote_recipe, new_data = NULL)
  
  # Train Logistic Regression
  logit_model_smote <- glm(Heart.Attack.Risk ~ ., data = smote_train, family = binomial)
  logit_probs_smote <- predict(logit_model_smote, newdata = test_data, type = "response")
  
  # Calculate AUC
  roc_obj <- roc(test_data$Heart.Attack.Risk, logit_probs_smote, levels = c("NoRisk", "Risk"))
  auc_results$AUC[i] <- auc(roc_obj)
}

# Find the best ratio
best_ratio <- auc_results$Ratio[which.max(auc_results$AUC)]
best_auc <- max(auc_results$AUC)
print(paste("Best SMOTE Ratio:", best_ratio, "with AUC:", round(best_auc, 4)))

# Visualize the SMOTE Ratio vs. AUC
ggplot(auc_results, aes(x = Ratio, y = AUC)) +
  geom_line(color = "dodgerblue", size = 1.2) +
  geom_point(color = "darkorange", size = 2) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = best_ratio, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  labs(title = "SMOTE Ratio vs. AUC (Optimized SMOTE)",
       x = "SMOTE Over-Sampling Ratio",
       y = "AUC") +
  theme_minimal()

### Apply Best SMOTE Ratio to Final Model
smote_recipe_best <- recipe(Heart.Attack.Risk ~ ., data = train_data) %>%
  step_smote(Heart.Attack.Risk, over_ratio = best_ratio) %>%  
  prep()

smote_train_best <- bake(smote_recipe_best, new_data = NULL)

# Logistic Regression with Best SMOTE Ratio
logit_model_best_smote <- glm(Heart.Attack.Risk ~ ., data = smote_train_best, family = binomial)
logit_probs_best_smote <- predict(logit_model_best_smote, newdata = test_data, type = "response")
logit_pred_best_smote <- factor(ifelse(logit_probs_best_smote > 0.5, "Risk", "NoRisk"), levels = c("NoRisk", "Risk"))

# Confusion Matrix - Best SMOTE
logit_cm_best_smote <- confusionMatrix(logit_pred_best_smote, test_data$Heart.Attack.Risk)
print(logit_cm_best_smote)

# ROC Curve for Best SMOTE
roc_obj_best_smote <- roc(test_data$Heart.Attack.Risk, logit_probs_best_smote, levels = c("NoRisk", "Risk"))
plot(roc_obj_best_smote, main = paste("Logistic Regression ROC Curve (Best SMOTE Ratio:", best_ratio, ")"))
print(paste("AUC for Best SMOTE Model:", auc(roc_obj_best_smote)))

# Confusion matrix heatmap
cm_df <- as.data.frame(logit_cm_best_smote$table)
ggplot(cm_df, aes(Prediction, Reference, fill = Freq)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = Freq), color = "white", size = 6) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "blue", high = "red") +
  labs(title = "Logistic Regression (SMOTE) Confusion Matrix", x = "Predicted", y = "Actual")
```



```{r}
# KNN
library(FNN)
set.seed(123)
### ----- Scaling Data (Standardizing) -----
# Identify numeric columns
numeric_columns <- names(train_data)[sapply(train_data, is.numeric)]

# Scaling with caret for consistency
scaler <- preProcess(train_data[, numeric_columns], method = c("center", "scale"))
train_data_scaled <- train_data
test_data_scaled <- test_data

train_data_scaled[numeric_columns] <- predict(scaler, train_data[, numeric_columns])
test_data_scaled[numeric_columns] <- predict(scaler, test_data[, numeric_columns])

# Separate predictors and target
x_train <- as.matrix(train_data_scaled %>% dplyr::select(-Heart.Attack.Risk))
x_test <- as.matrix(test_data_scaled %>% dplyr::select(-Heart.Attack.Risk))
y_train <- train_data_scaled$Heart.Attack.Risk
y_test <- test_data_scaled$Heart.Attack.Risk

### ----- Weighted KNN: Finding Best K -----
k_values <- seq(1, 100) # Testing odd values of K
auc_scores <- numeric(length(k_values))

for (i in seq_along(k_values)) {
  k <- k_values[i]
  
  # Weighted KNN using inverse distance weights
  knn_pred_probs <- FNN::knn.reg(train = x_train, test = x_train, y = as.numeric(y_train) - 1, 
                                 k = k, algorithm = "kd_tree")$pred
  
  # Calculating AUC
  roc_obj <- roc(y_train, knn_pred_probs)
  auc_scores[i] <- auc(roc_obj)
}

# Best K with highest AUC
best_k <- k_values[which.max(auc_scores)]
print(paste("Best K for Weighted KNN:", best_k))

# Plot AUC vs K values
auc_df <- data.frame(K = k_values, AUC = auc_scores)
ggplot(auc_df, aes(x = K, y = AUC)) +
  geom_line(color = "dodgerblue", size = 1.2) +
  geom_point(color = "darkorange", size = 2) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = best_k, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  labs(title = "Weighted KNN: AUC vs. K Values", x = "K (Number of Neighbors)", y = "AUC") +
  theme_minimal()

### ----- Weighted KNN with Best K on Test Set -----
knn_pred_probs_best <- FNN::knn.reg(train = x_train, test = x_test, y = as.numeric(y_train) - 1, 
                                    k = best_k, algorithm = "kd_tree")$pred

# Convert probabilities to binary predictions (0.5 threshold)
knn_pred_final <- factor(ifelse(knn_pred_probs_best > 0.5, "Risk", "NoRisk"), levels = c("NoRisk", "Risk"))

# Confusion Matrix for Weighted KNN
knn_cm <- confusionMatrix(knn_pred_final, y_test)
print(knn_cm)

# ROC Curve and AUC for Weighted KNN
roc_obj_weighted_knn <- roc(y_test, knn_pred_probs_best)
plot(roc_obj_weighted_knn, main = paste("Weighted KNN ROC Curve (Best K =", best_k, ")"))
print(paste("AUC for Weighted KNN Model:", auc(roc_obj_weighted_knn)))
```

```{r}
# KNN SMOTE
### ----- Apply SMOTE to Training Data -----
smote_recipe <- recipe(Heart.Attack.Risk ~ ., data = train_data) %>%
  step_smote(Heart.Attack.Risk, over_ratio = 1) %>%  # 1:1 class balance
  prep()

smote_train <- bake(smote_recipe, new_data = NULL)

# Check class balance after SMOTE
table(smote_train$Heart.Attack.Risk)

### ----- Scaling Data (Standardizing) -----
# Identify numeric columns
numeric_columns <- names(smote_train)[sapply(smote_train, is.numeric)]

# Scaling with caret for consistency
scaler <- preProcess(smote_train[, numeric_columns], method = c("center", "scale"))
smote_train_scaled <- smote_train
test_data_scaled <- test_data

smote_train_scaled[numeric_columns] <- predict(scaler, smote_train[, numeric_columns])
test_data_scaled[numeric_columns] <- predict(scaler, test_data[, numeric_columns])

# Separate predictors and target
x_train <- as.matrix(smote_train_scaled %>% dplyr::select(-Heart.Attack.Risk))
x_test <- as.matrix(test_data_scaled %>% dplyr::select(-Heart.Attack.Risk))
y_train <- smote_train_scaled$Heart.Attack.Risk
y_test <- test_data_scaled$Heart.Attack.Risk

### ----- Optimizing K for KNN (SMOTE Data) -----
set.seed(123)
k_values <- seq(1, 100) # Testing odd values of K
auc_scores <- numeric(length(k_values))

for (i in seq_along(k_values)) {
  k <- k_values[i]
  knn_pred_cv <- knn(x_train, x_train, cl = y_train, k = k) # Using SMOTE training data for cross-validation
  auc_cv <- roc(y_train, as.numeric(knn_pred_cv == "Risk"))$auc
  auc_scores[i] <- auc_cv
}

# Best K with highest AUC
best_k <- k_values[which.max(auc_scores)]
print(paste("Best K for SMOTE KNN:", best_k))

# Plot AUC vs K values
auc_df <- data.frame(K = k_values, AUC = auc_scores)
ggplot(auc_df, aes(x = K, y = AUC)) +
  geom_line(color = "dodgerblue", size = 1.2) +
  geom_point(color = "darkorange", size = 2) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = best_k, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  labs(title = "SMOTE KNN: AUC vs. K Values", x = "K (Number of Neighbors)", y = "AUC") +
  theme_minimal()

### ----- Final KNN Model with Best K -----
knn_pred_smote <- knn(x_train, x_test, cl = y_train, k = best_k)

# Confusion Matrix for SMOTE KNN
knn_cm_smote <- confusionMatrix(knn_pred_smote, y_test)
print(knn_cm_smote)

# ROC Curve and AUC for SMOTE KNN
roc_smote_knn <- roc(y_test, as.numeric(knn_pred_smote == "Risk"))
plot(roc_smote_knn, main = paste("SMOTE KNN ROC Curve (Best K =", best_k, ")"))
print(paste("AUC for SMOTE KNN Model:", auc(roc_smote_knn)))
```


```{r}
### ----- Calculate Precision, Recall, F1-Score Function -----
calculate_metrics <- function(cm) {
  precision <- cm$byClass["Pos Pred Value"]
  recall <- cm$byClass["Sensitivity"]
  f1 <- (2 * precision * recall) / (precision + recall)
  return(c(Precision = precision, Recall = recall, F1_Score = f1))
}

### ----- Calculate Metrics for Logistic Regression -----
# Logistic Regression (Original)
logit_metrics_original <- calculate_metrics(logit_cm)

# Logistic Regression (SMOTE)
logit_metrics_smote <- calculate_metrics(logit_cm_best_smote)

### ----- Calculate Metrics for KNN -----
# KNN (Original)
knn_metrics_original <- calculate_metrics(knn_cm)

# KNN (SMOTE)
knn_metrics_smote <- calculate_metrics(knn_cm_smote)

### ----- Combine All Metrics for Comparison -----
metrics_df <- data.frame(
  Model = rep(c("Logistic (Original)", "Logistic (SMOTE)", 
                "KNN (Original)", "KNN (SMOTE)"), each = 3),
  Metric = rep(c("Precision", "Recall", "F1_Score"), 4),
  Value = c(logit_metrics_original, logit_metrics_smote,
            knn_metrics_original, knn_metrics_smote)
)

### ----- Plotting the Metrics Comparison -----
library(ggplot2)
ggplot(metrics_df, aes(x = Metric, y = Value, fill = Model)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.7), width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(Value, 3)), vjust = -0.3, 
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.7), size = 4) +
  labs(title = "Precision, Recall, F1-Score Comparison: Logistic vs. KNN", 
       y = "Value", x = "Metric") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("dodgerblue", "darkorange", "darkgreen", "purple"))

```
